<!-- English preferred; 中文也完全可以。 -->

### The problem you're trying to solve

What's missing or painful today? / 现状缺什么、哪里不顺手?

### Your proposed solution

How would you like it to work? / 你希望它怎么工作?

### Alternatives you considered

### Context

- Would this fit the local-first principle (no forced cloud dependency)? / 是否符合本地优先原则(不强制依赖云端)?
- Anything else (screenshots, links, prior art)?
